title: ProtocolLab HTTP/2 Comparison Contract Verification
scope: Verify the public HTTP/2 comparison contract structure only; do not claim executor, implementation, runner, comparison, benchmark, or publication proof.
verification_method: Schema validation, valid and invalid fixture checks, suite and load-profile reference resolution, traceability inspection, and repository-boundary inspection.
procedure: Confirm connections means established connections, concurrency means global in-flight operations, and streamsPerConnection means a per-connection cap.
Confirm http2-comparison is exactly 16 connections, 128 global concurrency, an 8-stream cap, and balanced-round-robin distribution.
Confirm the comparison suite selects only http2.core.plaintext and http2.core.json.
Confirm comparison report contracts preserve requested and effective topology plus executor and load-generator identity.
Confirm invalid fixtures reject over-capacity load, missing distribution, and missing comparison concurrency evidence.
expected_result: The HTTP/2 comparison contract is unambiguous, fail-closed, non-publishable, and internally consistent without claiming executable support.
